M-020.NAME: device-registry
M-020.owns: device records, device lifecycle state, device-linked peer state and durable device security events

exports.type-UserDevice: Logical user device with active/revoked/blocked/replaced lifecycle state
exports.type-DeviceSecurityEvent: Audit or anomaly record for device lifecycle or anti-sharing signals

M-020.hotspot: H-008: Device migration is risky because legacy users already have live peers that must become deterministic primary devices
